title: The Story of Ruth: The Most Famous Convert in Jewish History
title_zh: 路得的故事:犹太历史上最著名的皈依者
title_he: סיפור רות: הגיורת המפורסמת ביותר בהיסטוריה היהודית
description: The biblical story of Ruth the Moabite, whose words 'Your people will be my people, and your God my God' became the eternal declaration of conversion to Judaism.
author: Torah Light Writing Team

chinese_dynasty_references.context: Period when Ruth's story took place and when the Book of Songs was being compiled

key_concepts.english: Your people will be my people, and your God my God
key_concepts.chinese: 你的民就是我的民，你的神就是我的神

key_concepts.english: Under the wings of the Divine Presence
